title_en: 5. If one or both parties refuse to accept the verdict of the two
content_en: arbitrators, any party that refuses is regarded to be the The Battles of the Camel and Siffeen, and the issue of arbitration party that was in the wrong, whether the refusal comes from one or both of them. In that case, it is Islamically binding upon Muslim forces in other countries to follow the instructions and military decrees issued by the two arbitrators to put an end to the conflict by force, by intervening in a way that does not lead to harm or risk that is greater than that of the current conflict.
